title: Business Analyst ( Junior )
raw_description:
About Us

Innovate. Create. Elevate.

At Vertis, we believe innovation starts with people. We design and deliver exceptional digital solutions that elevate our clients' brands and the experiences they create for their customers. Through technology-driven creativity, we enable meaningful business transformation. Our team is made up of capable, confident, and motivated individuals who collaborate, challenge ideas, and grow together.

About the job

We are looking for a passionate and detail-oriented Junior Business Analyst to join our dynamic team. In this role, you will assist in gathering and analyzing business requirements, supporting documentation efforts, and facilitating communication between business stakeholders and technical teams. This is a fantastic opportunity for someone eager to develop their skills in business analysis, digital transformation, and agile methodologies.

Key Responsibilities

  • Assist in gathering, documenting, and analyzing business and system requirements.
  • Support requirements discussions and workshops with clients and internal teams.
  • Collaborate with developers, testers, and project managers to ensure the solution meets business needs.
  • Help translate business requirements into clear, concise functional specifications and user stories.
  • Participate in system testing, including preparation of test cases and test execution.
  • Assist in the preparation of user manuals, training materials, and process documentation.
  • Contribute to post-implementation reviews and user feedback sessions.
  • Support project teams in the implementation of Agile or SDLC processes.
  • Maintain and update documentation in tools such as JIRA and Confluence.
  • Participate in research, analysis, and proposal writing for business solutions.

Requirements and Qualification

  • 1–3 years of experience in a Business Analyst or similar role. Fresh graduates are encouraged to apply.
  • A Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field.
  • Basic understanding of the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) and Agile methodology.
  • Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving abilities.
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
  • Strong attention to detail and willingness to learn.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools (Word, Excel, PowerPoint).
  • Familiarity with JIRA, Confluence, or similar tools is a plus.
  • Singapore Citizen or Permanent Resident (SPR).

Security Requirement (Mandatory)

This role involves work on Singapore Government projects. Candidates must have the legal right to work in Singapore and must be eligible for the required security clearance. Appointment to this role is subject to successful completion of all security vetting and clearance requirements.

Benefits

  • Competitive pay
  • Medical benefits
  • International and multicultural work environment
  • Continuous training and development opportunities
  • Birthday leave to celebrate your special day
  • Career growth in a dynamic, fast-growing company

Our Hiring Process
After submitting your application, our Talent Acquisition team will review your profile. If your skills and experience align with the role, we'll get in touch to discuss the next steps. Please be cautious of recruitment fraud, only engage with emails from our official that end with @vertis.digital domain.

Vertis is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. We believe that diversity of thought, background, and experience drives innovation and success. That's why were committed to building and nurturing a team that reflects a wide range of perspectives, abilities, identities, and experiences. At Vertis, every voice matters, and together, we achieve more. We appreciate all applications; however, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Thank you for your interest.

The use of artificial intelligence tools, including language models such as ChatGPT, during the interview process is strictly prohibited and will result in the disqualification of your application.

Singapore Citizens are welcome to apply. This position is supported by IMDAs Company-Led Training Programme.

title: Sales Executive (West / Semiconductor / Business travelling required)
raw_description:
The candidate will play a leading role in engaging prospects and maintaining customer relationship, and given an opportunity to travel overseas, as well as making an impact on corporate and product marketing.

Responsibilities

  • Customer relationship management – build and maintain business relationships with semiconductor customers in Singapore.
  • Sales activities – responsible for the business contact, product promotion, order processing, and communication with customers in Singapore.
  • Market reports – consolidate customer feedback and information from various sources to provide market trends and analysis.
  • Business travel – for product training and meeting with manufacturer (principal).
  • Work with Principal to facilitate the import, storage, and delivery of products to customers in Singapore.
  • Marketing materials – work with stakeholders to prepare marketing materials for promoting company and products.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in any discipline; candidates with qualifications in engineering, science, business, or marketing are preferred.
  • 1–2 years of experience in sales, business development, or customer-facing roles.
  • Comfortable engaging customers, conducting site visits, and building long-term relationships.
  • Strong interpersonal and communication skills.
  • Self-motivated, target-oriented, and willing to take ownership of assigned accounts.
  • Willingness to conduct frequent customer visits and occasional overseas business travel
  • Strong interest in sales, business growth, and personal achievement.

raw_description:

  • Able to work on split shifts, weekends, and public holidays

title: L1 IT Support Specialist (Retail & Office)
raw_description:
Responsibilities

  • Provide first-line IT support for corporate office and boutique users, ensuring smooth daily operations across retail and business environments.
  • Troubleshoot and resolve hardware, software, network, and connectivity issues for end-user devices such as laptops, printers, mobile devices, and peripherals.
  • Perform user and access administration, including email, Office 365 accounts, and system permissions, in line with IT policies.
  • Support device lifecycle activities such as setup, deployment, replacement, and decommissioning for staff movements and store openings.
  • Assist with routine IT operations including system updates, patching, basic maintenance, and health monitoring under guidance from senior IT members.
  • Maintain accurate IT asset records, manage software installations and licences, and coordinate with vendors for repairs, replacements, and warranties.
  • Support basic network and infrastructure matters (LAN, Wi-Fi, VPN), and assist during boutique renovations, relocations, or IT upgrades.
  • Log, track, and document incidents and resolutions in the ticketing system, support security and compliance requirements, and provide operational support for IT projects and go-live activities.

Requirements:

  • Diploma or Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related discipline, with 2–5 years of hands-on IT support experience.
  • Experience supporting end users in office and/or retail environments, with working knowledge of Windows/macOS, Office 365, and basic networking.
  • Familiarity with IT service desk tools, asset management, hardware/software troubleshooting, and basic IT security practices; POS system exposure is an advantage.
  • Customer-focused, organised, and dependable, with strong communication skills and the flexibility to support a fast-paced retail environment, including occasional after-hours support when required.

Please submit your updated resume in Word format by using the Apply Now Button.
We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.
Email resume to ken.ng@peopleprofilers.com

title: 6723 - Junior Conveyancing Lawyer [Telok Ayer | Property Law | 5 days]
raw_description:
Position title: Junior Conveyancing Lawyer

Working Days: 5 days
Working Timing: 9:00 am to 6:00 pm
Working Location: Telok Ayer
Starting Salary: $5,500

Key Responsibilities & Duties:

  • Prepare and review legal documents related to property transactions. These documents include sale and purchase agreements and loan agreements.
  • You will provide advice to clients on all aspects of buying or selling property. This includes legal issues, financial considerations, and contract matters.
  • Engage in negotiations with the other party’s lawyer for the Option to Purchase (OTP). Provide advice to clients on the conveyancing process and their rights and obligations.
  • Liaise with various parties involved in the transaction, including real estate agents, mortgage lenders, and other relevant stakeholders.

Qualifications and Requirements:

  • Bachelor's Degree in Law 
  • 0-3 years of Post-Qualification Experience (PQE) in conveyancing or related legal work.

title: AI Research Scientist
raw_description:
About Bitdeer:

Bitdeer Technologies Group (Nasdaq: BTDR) is a leader in the blockchain and high-performance computing industry. It is one of the world’s largest holders of proprietary hash rate and suppliers of hash rate. Bitdeer is committed to providing comprehensive computing solutions for its customers.

Headquartered in Singapore, Bitdeer has deployed mining data centers in the United States, Norway, and Bhutan. It offers specialized mining infrastructure, high-quality hash rate sharing products, and reliable hosting services to global users. The company also offers advanced cloud capabilities for customers with high demands for artificial intelligence.

About Bitdeer AI Lab:

Bitdeer AI Lab is a frontier AI Lab under Bitdeer, a global-leading computing power solutions provider. We will focus on two core missions: First, effectively transforming energy into intelligence; second, pushing the limits of intelligence by redefining AI architectures to achieve human-level learning efficiency and reasoning capabilities. Our vision is to create intelligence that learns like humans do: efficiently, adaptively, and recursively, transforming finite parameters into unbounded potential.

Our lab is equipped with thousands of cutting-edge GPUs dedicated to AI research, and we are committed to continuously investing in and expanding our computational infrastructure to support research in artificial intelligence.

Job Summary:

We are looking for key talents to develop in the following areas

  • LLM Area (Large-scale language model pre-training)
  • Reinforcement learning for reasoning models
  • Advanced AI systems (Data construction, curation, and engineering for large-scale model training )

Our ideal candidate:

  • Fresh graduates (Bachelors, Masters, PhD) from all disciplines and/or candidates with up to 2 years of related work experience.
  • Strong background in the LLM era with hands-on experience in: Large-scale language model pre-training (preferably 3B+ parameter models with 500B+ token datasets)
  • Reinforcement learning for reasoning models and advanced AI systems - Data construction, curation, and engineering for large-scale model training
  • Understanding of distributed training, scaling laws, and optimization techniques （I）Deep passion for cutting-edge AI technologies and research （II）Impressive personal achievements in academics, research projects, internships, or demonstrated expertise in AI/ML domains
  • Most importantly: driven to create meaningful impact early in your career, with strong ownership mentality, accountability, and unwavering commitment to pursuing excellence in AI research

What you will experience working with us:

  • A culture that values authenticity and diversity of thoughts and backgrounds;
  • An inclusive and respectable environment with open workspaces and exciting start-up spirit;
  • Fast-growing company with the chance to network with industrial pioneers and enthusiasts;
  • Ability to contribute directly and make an impact on the future of the digital asset industry;
  • Involvement in new projects, developing processes/systems;
  • Personal accountability, autonomy, fast growth, and learning opportunities;
  • Attractive welfare benefits and developmental opportunities such as training and mentoring.
description: About Bitdeer: Bitdeer Technologies Group (Nasdaq: BTDR) is a leader in the blockchain and high-performance computing industry. It is one of the world’s largest holders of proprietary hash rate and suppliers of hash rate. Bitdeer is committed to providing comprehensive computing solutions for its customers. Headquartered in Singapore, Bitdeer has deployed mining data centers in the United States, Norway, and Bhutan. It offers specialized mining infrastructure, high-quality hash rate sharing products, and reliable hosting services to global users. The company also offers advanced cloud capabilities for customers with high demands for artificial intelligence. About Bitdeer AI Lab: Bitdeer AI Lab is a frontier AI Lab under Bitdeer, a global-leading computing power solutions provider. We will focus on two core missions: First, effectively transforming energy into intelligence; second, pushing the limits of intelligence by redefining AI architectures to achieve human-level learning efficiency and reasoning capabilities. Our vision is to create intelligence that learns like humans do: efficiently, adaptively, and recursively, transforming finite parameters into unbounded potential. Our lab is equipped with thousands of cutting-edge GPUs dedicated to AI research, and we are committed to continuously investing in and expanding our computational infrastructure to support research in artificial intelligence. Job Summary: We are looking for key talents to develop in the following areas LLM Area (Large-scale language model pre-training) Reinforcement learning for reasoning models Advanced AI systems (Data construction, curation, and engineering for large-scale model training ) Our ideal candidate: Fresh graduates (Bachelors, Masters, PhD) from all disciplines and/or candidates with up to 2 years of related work experience. Strong background in the LLM era with hands-on experience in: Large-scale language model pre-training (preferably 3B+ parameter models with 500B+ token datasets) Reinforcement learning for reasoning models and advanced AI systems - Data construction, curation, and engineering for large-scale model training Understanding of distributed training, scaling laws, and optimization techniques （I）Deep passion for cutting-edge AI technologies and research （II）Impressive personal achievements in academics, research projects, internships, or demonstrated expertise in AI/ML domains Most importantly: driven to create meaningful impact early in your career, with strong ownership mentality, accountability, and unwavering commitment to pursuing excellence in AI research What you will experience working with us: A culture that values authenticity and diversity of thoughts and backgrounds; An inclusive and respectable environment with open workspaces and exciting start-up spirit; Fast-growing company with the chance to network with industrial pioneers and enthusiasts; Ability to contribute directly and make an impact on the future of the digital asset industry; Involvement in new projects, developing processes/systems; Personal accountability, autonomy, fast growth, and learning opportunities; Attractive welfare benefits and developmental opportunities such as training and mentoring.

raw_description:
Why Join Us?

At FirstCom Academy, we believe in empowering our team with cutting-edge technology and a dynamic work environment that fosters innovation. As a Junior IT Executive, you’ll be part of a fast-growing company where your skills and ideas make a real impact.

🔹 Hands-On Experience – Gain exposure to a wide range of IT systems, troubleshooting, and network management.
🔹 Career Growth – We invest in your professional development through training and mentorship.
🔹 Innovative Work Culture – Work alongside a passionate team that values collaboration and creative problem-solving.
🔹 Exciting Industry – Be part of the media and tech space, where technology meets creativity.
🔹 Supportive Environment – Enjoy a positive workplace culture that prioritizes teamwork and personal growth.

If you’re looking to kick-start your IT career with real-world experience and career progression, FirstCom Academy is the place for you! 🚀

Job Responsibilities:

  • Able to provide support to end-users on-site/remotely on devices such as computers &
    mobile phones, office devices (printers, AV equipment), and other peripherals.

  • Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.
  • Eagerness to learn and keep up with emerging technologies.
  • Willingness to provide on-site and remote IT support as needed.
  • Able to work on ad-hoc IT projects and system upgrades.

title: Embedded Software Engineer (Aerospace)
raw_description:
Job Description:

  • In charge of designing the PCB layout of electronic circuit boards and generate Gerber files for PCB fabrication.
  • Responsible in research and define efficient and reliable architecture to fulfil electronic circuit board requirements for the company drone systems.
  • In charge of firmware programming in embedded C/C++ language.
  • In charge of testing PCB assemblies thoroughly and ensure they operate as expected.
  • Responsible in sourcing suitable electronic components to implement the design architecture.
  • In charge of studying datasheets of the electronic components and design the schematic of electronic circuit boards that can fulfil the requirements.
  • Responsible in generateing documents and drawings of design and test.

Job Requirement:

  • Minimum Degree in Mechanical/ Electrical/ Aerospace/ Mechatronics Engineering or relevant
  • Minimum 3 years of working experience in electronic hardware and firmware design
  • Experience in analog and digital circuit design with experience in designing electronic circuits with microcontrollers, digital signal processors (DSP), field programmable gate arrays (FPGAs), etc
  • Proficient in schematic and PCB design tools such as Altium Designer, OrCAD Capture and PCB Designer, Autodesk EAGLE, etc and using instruments such as multimeters, oscilloscopes, logic analysers, etc. to troubleshoot issues on electronic circuit boards.
  • Proficient in C/C++ programming language.
  • Knowledge in various communication buses and protocols such as UART, I2C, SPI, CAN, Ethernet, etc.

To submit your application, please apply online to apply@rn-care.com or call +(65) 6513 5697 for private and confidential discussion.

Your interest will be treated with the strictest of confidence. We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified or contacted.

This is a dynamic, entrepreneurial team with a passion for the markets, with individuals who thrive in fast-paced, changing environments and are energized by a bustling trading floor.

Global Banking & Markets: Transformation Office 
Are you a looking for a new opportunity to showcase your intellectual curiosity, advisory and project management skills? Do you have a strategic mindset and the ability to influence change? Do you wish to be valued for your innovative approach to problem-solving? We have an excellent new position available within our Transformation Office team for Global banking & Markets.

The Global Banking & Markets Transformation Office Team is searching for dedicated individuals who thrives in a collaborative and challenging environment to join our team. Global Change Managers serve as program or product managers on high priority initiatives within the Global Banking & Markets Division. You will work alongside other Change Managers, Product Managers, Sales, Strats, Engineers and Designers to ensure solutions are designed and implemented for the Global Banking & Markets Division in true ‘front to back’ fashion. You will leverage your technical expertise and project management skills to influence and drive the team to deliver these complex projects within budget and with a high quality. 

HOW YOU WILL FULFILL YOUR POTENTIAL

  • Work with Sales, Trading, Engineering and Operations teams to develop and implement strategic complex initiatives to enable business growth, regulatory compliance and control improvements 
  • Leverage project management methodologies (e.g. Waterfall, Agile) and governance tools to provide transparency to senior stakeholders on project scope, timelines, budget and delivery risks 
  • Identify and manage project risks from inception to completion while driving resolutions and risk & issue mitigants 
  • Perform detailed analysis to enhance business, system & operational workflows
  • Facilitate communication on key project matters (incl. reporting and escalations) across GBM teams, including Sales, Operations, Engineering, Legal, Compliance
  • Provide oversight on the project book of work, ensuring cross project dependencies, risks, and budget are proactively managed 
  • Facilitate the performance of quality assurance testing, migration plans and post implementation reviews alongside product

SKILLS & EXPERIENCE WE’RE LOOKING FOR

  • Bachelor's Degree
  • 1-3 years’ relevant experience, preferably in a business analysis / project / program management function
  • Strong analytical and business analysis experience, including process analysis 
  • Strategic thinker able to identify cross functional issues, provide innovative solutions, and communicate the implications of solutions across existing processes, systems and teams, e.g. costs, risk, service
  • Project management skills including project scope definition; project issues, challenges, risks definition; status reporting; User Acceptance Test execution
  • A proven track record of scoping and driving delivery of projects. Has delivered results in a cross functional team setting, on time and to budget
  • Experienced in driving collaboration and facilitate discussions with stakeholders to perform problem solving and solution analysis 
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, written and oral; confident in interaction with senior stakeholders

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

  • Knowledge of products and processes related to the financial services industry would be an advantage, as is related experience in technology strategy or in a client service or business function and / or management consulting
  • Core knowledge base of Global Banking & Markets
  • Demonstrate understanding of Financial Services & Operations processes and procedures 
  • Familiarity with project management methodologies and concepts, Project Management related certifications preferred but optional (e.g. PMP, Prince2, Agile, etc.)
  • Experience developing products using customer and design-centric practices
  • Knowledge of automated testing tools and frameworks, Agile Testing practices
  • Experience on tools like JIRA and JIRA Portfolio or similar applications
  • Knowledge of OKR frameworks and roadmaps, as well as other governance and project planning tooling 

ABOUT GOLDMAN SACHS
At Goldman Sachs, we commit our people, capital and ideas to help our clients, shareholders and the communities we serve to grow. Founded in 1869, we are a leading global investment banking, securities and investment management firm. Headquartered in New York, we maintain offices around the world. 

We believe who you are makes you better at what you do. We're committed to fostering and advancing diversity and inclusion in our own workplace and beyond by ensuring every individual within our firm has a number of opportunities to grow professionally and personally, from our training and development opportunities and firmwide networks to benefits, wellness and personal finance offerings and mindfulness programs. Learn more about our culture, benefits, and people at GS.com/careers. 

We’re committed to finding reasonable accommodations for candidates with special needs or disabilities during our recruiting process. Learn more: https://www.goldmansachs.com/careers/footer/disability-statement.html

©The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc., 2026. All rights reserved.
Goldman Sachs is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, veterans status, disability, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law.

title: Research Fellow / Engineer (Food Engineering) - AZN5
raw_description:
As a University of Applied Learning, SIT works closely with industry in our research pursuits. Our research staff will have the opportunity to be equipped with applied research skill sets that are relevant to industry demands while working on research projects in SIT. 

The primary purpose of this role is to deliver on a collaborative research project, Proteins for Singapore (P4SG), where you will be part of the research team to establish and understand the structuration of algae/soybean/mung bean proteins for high quality alternative protein foods including through high moisture extrusion.

Key responsibilities will include:

  • Explore innovative methods for food process optimization including the use of AI and machine-learning
  • Develop and execute methods for characterizing and linking the texture and structure of alternative protein foods
  • Design, execute, and interpret experiments independently.
  • Participate in and manage the research project with Principal Investigators (PI), and the research team members to ensure all project deliverables including periodic progress reports are met.
  • Author papers in high-quality journals and contribute to grant writing in areas that are related to the research.
  • Carry out Risk Assessment, and ensure compliance with Work, Safety and Health Regulations.
  • Coordinate procurement and liaison with vendors/suppliers.
  • Work independently, as well as manage a team of junior researchers and students to ensure proper operation and maintenance of equipment.
  • To communicate and liaise with any internal and external stakeholders to ensure project deliverables are met.
  • Any other ad-hoc duties assigned by supervisor.

Ideal qualities of the candidate include:

  • Able to build and maintain strong working relationships with people within and external to the university.
  • Self-directed learner who believes in continuous learning and development
  • Highly proficient in technical writing and presentation 
  • Strong analytical and critical thinking skills
  • Strong initiative and takes ownership of work

The candidate should have relevant competence in the areas of processing technology, physical and structural analysis, material formulation, and mathmatical modeling. The candidate should also have a PhD or other advanced degree in a food or engineering related field. Knowledge of food formulation, sensory analysis, extrusion technology, machine learning, and rheology will be advantageous.

title: Marketing Executive (Copywriting)
raw_description:
Our client is one of the local leading Herbal & Wellness Beverage Companies. Due to business needs, they are now recruiting a Marketing Executive to be part of their Marketing team for ongoing transformation projects. They are located in the North – easily accessible.

Job Responsibilities of Marketing Executive

  • Manage and enhance the company’s digital presence across social media, website, and email channels.
  • Create and publish engaging content to strengthen brand awareness and audience engagement.
  • Support customer engagement, CRM activities, and lead management.
  • Execute online and offline marketing campaigns, including events and partnerships.
  • Support lead generation, sales funnel optimisation, and revenue growth initiatives.
  • Track marketing performance and prepare reports with insights and recommendations.
  • Collaborate with internal teams and external partners to deliver marketing initiatives.
  • Leverage digital and AI tools to improve campaign effectiveness and efficiency.
  • Support e-commerce and growth marketing initiatives, including customer acquisition and retention.

Qualifications

  • At least 2 years of experience in marketing related fields.
  • Diploma or Degree in Marketing related disciplines.
  • Strong copywriting and communication skills in English
  • Proficient in Adobe Creative Suite or Canva
  • Experience in photography and videography

Interested candidates who wish to apply for the advertised position, please click APPLY NOW or email an updated copy of your resume/cv.
We regret that only shortlisted candidate will be notified.

title: Associate Engineer (Fabs Operation / 12-hours shift)
raw_description:
Responsibilities:

  • Operate multiple type of semiconductor equipment in cleanroom environment based on process specifications. 
  • Ability to use computer-based programs and applications to perform daily work/duties.
  • Participate actively and be responsible in assigned on-the-job assignments and other required trainings when requested.
  • Monitor performance, timely communication with Engineers-in-charge to perform equipment errors recovery promptly when necessary.
  • Demonstrate excellent teamwork to promptly execute process sequences and data collections if required.
  • Always follow safety protocols & rules in the Clean Room.
  • Ensure 6S in the work environment and promptly report hazards/ suspicious/ abnormal activities or personnel if any identified.
  • Address potential areas for improvements such as wafers processing cycle time, Equipment utilization, Safety/ Compliances, and cost savings.
  • Provide machine operations coverage and backup supports when necessary.

Requirements:

  • Diploma/Degree in Microelectronics/Electrical/Mechanical/Chemical Engineering or equivalent.
  • Understanding of semiconductor process - at least 1-3 years of experience in semiconductor processes (Photolithography, Dry/Wet Etch/Cleans, Thin Films, Diffusions, Chemical mechanical Polishing, Metrology, etc.)
  • Able to perform independently yet working in a team.

Flexi Work Arrangements, Essential Financial Knowledge, Attractive Remuneration

We believe in providing a holistic approach in service to our clients, ensuring their needs are met and satisfied in our care. And we believe that it starts with us!


Join our team as a Financial Advisor and enjoy a flexible work setting, comprehensive training, support structure, together with market leading remuneration. This role is ideal for both fresh graduates and those seeking a mid-career switch. Connect with us and embark on a rewarding career in financial advisory


A Day in The Life of a Financial Advisor:

  • Client Networking: Establish and grow a robust client base through effective networking and prospecting strategies.
  • Financial Strategy Development: Analyze clients' financial situations and goals to create tailored financial strategies.
  • Insurance and Financial Advisory: Provide comprehensive advisory on insurance and financial planning, covering areas such as retirement, education, and investments, supported by our extensive product suite.
  • Financial Analysis: Presenting detailed financial summaries, investment reports, and income projections for clients.
  • Client Relationship Management: Maintain and strengthen client relationships through regular reviews and adjustments to financial plans based on life changes.

Benefits & Rewards:

  • 24-months Trainee Program: Provides monthly allowance + commission, supporting you in the first 24 months of your career.
  • Extensive Training and Support Structure: Regular workshops, training & sharing sessions within the agency and individual mentorship ensuring support along the way.
  • Flexi-Hybrid Work Setting: Enjoy a hybrid work setting with flexible work arrangements.
  • Attractive Rewards: We believe in 'work hard, play hard', with incentives for top performers & fun team-bonding events.
  • Market-leading Remuneration Structure: Market-leading remuneration package along with an attractive incentive system, including commissions, performance incentives, and up to 3 incentive trips a year.

Qualifications:

  • Singaporean / Singapore PR preferred
  • Minimum 21 years old with Polytechnic Diploma, GCE 'A' level Certification or Bachelor Degree in any field, as per MAS requirements.
  • Highly motivated with strong interpersonal skills

Apply now to find out more!

title: Office Assistant
raw_description:
Job Overview

As an Office Assistant, you will provide general administrative and clerical support to ensure smooth day-to-day office operations. This role involves assisting with office coordination, documentation, basic data entry, and supporting staff and management, including handling all information with strict confidentialityand professionalism. To succeed in this role, you should be dependable, organised, detail-oriented and able to manage multiple tasks efficiently in a professional office environment.

Responsibilities

Administrative & Office Support

  • Assist in organising and maintaining office common areas to ensure a clean and orderly environment.
  • Manage day-to-day office operations and administrative tasks
  • Maintain office supplies,equipment, and facilities
  • Handle incoming calls, emails, mail, and courier arrangements
  • Assist with data entry, basic bookkeeping, invoice processing, claims and expense record management as required.

Scheduling & Coordination

  • Organise and support meetings,events, and conferences, including logistics and arrangements.

Documentation & Records Management

  • Prepare, file, and maintain documents, reports, and correspondence
  • Maintain accurate records, databases and filing systems (both physical and digital).
  • Assist in preparing presentations and basic reports

General Support

  • Provide administrative support to management and team members.
  • Confident in serving guests during lunch and dinner service when required.
  • Handle ad hoc personal tasks for Heads of Departments as required.
  • Any other duties as assigned


Requirements

  • Minimum Diploma/ Degree in Business Administration or related field
  • 2-4 years of relevant office administration experience
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook)
  • Prior experience or industry knowledge in Accounting and/or F&B will be an advantage
  • Ability to manage multiple tasks and prioritise competing demands to meet deadlines
  • A professional and approachable demeanour with strong verbal and written communication skills.
  • Strong organisational and time-management skills with attention to detail.
  • Responsible and reliable, with the ability to handle all information confidentially and professionally

title: Research Fellow (Cellular Agriculture)
raw_description:
The School of Materials Science and Engineering (MSE) provides a vibrant and nurturing environment for staff and students to carry out inter-disciplinary research in key areas such as Computational Materials Science, Characterisation Materials Science, Defence Composite Materials, Functional Composite Materials, Energy, Nanomaterials, Low Dimensional Materials, Biomaterials Materials, Biological Materials, Bioinspired Materials and Sustainable Materials.

For more details, please view https://www.ntu.edu.sg/mse/research.

The antimicrobial peptide chemistry group, led by Professor Zvi Hayouka, has world-leading expertise in multiple research areas, such as peptide chemistry, peptide modifications, microbiology, antimicrobial peptides design and synthesis, solid phase chemistry, peptide bacterial binders, and biosensing. We are looking to hire a Research Fellow. The candidate should adapt to new peptide synthesis and discovery techniques and support the surface assembly processes of the lead peptides, antimicrobial assays development, and electrochemical studies efforts led by the other partners in the consortia. The candidate shall work under the supervision of the Principal Investigator, who will be most of the time via remote supervision, to conduct research work as follows:

Key Responsibilities:

  • Collects and prepare data/ information/ proposal required for relevant grant call process
  • Conducts experiments related to the synthesis and characterization of peptide bacterial binders or antimicrobial peptides
  • Assists in interpreting and applying processes and procedures to conduct/monitor project progress
  • Gathers information/ data and prepare documents for reporting/ papers
  • Assists in and delivers training and coaching new members with relevant laboratory/ technical skills
  • Report remotely to the PI and travel to Israel for training

Job Requirements:

  • Ph.D. degree in Peptide Chemistry/Microbiology
  • Strong experimental skills, especially in peptide chemistry and mainly in the design of antimicrobial peptides and characterize their antimicrobial and selectivity profile.
  • Excellent communication and organizational skills while hard-working and able to meet tight deadlines
  • Able to work independently in gathering information/ data and preparing documents for reporting/ papers
  • Willing to contribute to team services like sharing/ coaching new members with relevant laboratory/ technical skills

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

title: Site Engineer | Main Con
raw_description:
Site Engineer (Construction)
Construction Industry | Site Base

  • Work Location: Marsiling Singapore
  • Working Hours: Mon – Fri 8am – 5pm, Sat 8am - 12pm
  • Monthly Salary: Basic up to $5000 + Variable Bonus (VB)
  • Employment Type: Full time, Permanent Contract

Company Overview

The Company is a trusted Singapore construction company specializing in building and civil engineering works. With proven expertise in infrastructure projects such as bridges, tunnels, viaducts, and expressways, the company is recognized for delivering quality, reliable, and innovative solutions to both public and private sector clients.

Responsibility

  • Supervise and coordinate daily site operations to ensure construction activities progress according to project schedules.
  • Interpret and apply construction drawings, specifications, and technical documents to guide site execution.
  • Collaborate with consultants, architects, subcontractors, and suppliers to resolve site and technical issues efficiently.
  • Ensure all site works comply with statutory regulations, project requirements, and established quality standards.
  • Conduct regular site inspections, monitor progress, and maintain accurate records of daily activities.
  • Prepare method statements, shop drawings, and as-built documentation to support project delivery.
  • Assist with material requisitions, quantity take-offs, and measurement of work completed for progress claims.
  • Work closely with the Safety Officer and Project Manager to uphold safety standards and ensure compliance with protocols.
  • Provide timely updates to the Project Manager on progress, potential delays, and technical challenges

Requirements

  • Degree in Civil/Structural Engineering recognized PEB or BCA, Singapore
  • Minimum 1 year of relevant industrial or commercial project experience
  • Strong knowledge of construction processes, codes and safety regulations
  • Good interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to coordinate effectively.
  • Candidate who can start immediately or within short notice will be preferred

We regret to inform you that only shortlisted applicants will be notified.
